/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Os -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libns3.45-wban-default.so -o /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-wban-default.so CMakeFiles/wban.dir/model/wban.cc.o "CMakeFiles/wban.dir/helper/wban-helper.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/wban.dir/model/wban-error-model.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/wban.dir/model/wban-interference-helper.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/wban.dir/model/wban-lqi-tag.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/wban.dir/model/wban-spectrum-signal-parameters.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/wban.dir/model/wban-spectrum-value-helper.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/wban.dir/model/wban-phy-header.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/wban.dir/model/wban-phy.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/wban.dir/model/wban-net-device.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/wban.dir/model/wban-propagation-model.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/wban.dir/model/wban-channel.cc.o"   -L/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: -Wl,--no-as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-spectrum-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-propagation-default.so -Wl,--as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-mobility-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-network-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-stats-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-antenna-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-core-default.so -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wl,--as-needed
